stonetop.summary: A Hillfolk sorcerer who seeks power for its own sake, heedless of rule or taboo.

system.concept: A Hillfolk sorcerer who seeks power for its own sake, heedless of rule or taboo.
system.description: Where a spirit-talker uses their power with care and only for their people, the hdour steps over every line — seeking power for power's sake, using it selfishly. The Hillfolk fear them, and with reason: even slaying one is perilous, for a dying hdour's curse can damn its killers (see the Ghostly Legion).
